title: Plush Chicken Tikka Masala
description: A creamy and aromatic Indian dish made with marinated chicken, served in a rich tomato-based sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together pho broth, garam masala, cumin, coriander, and salt.
2. Add the plush chicken breasts to the marinade and mix well.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
6. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Transfer the chicken to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
8. In a large saucepan, melt the stilton cheese over medium heat.
9. Add the tomato puree and heavy cream (if using) to the saucepan.
10. Stir to combine and bring the sauce to a simmer.
11. Add the grilled chicken to the saucepan and stir to coat with the sauce.
12. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lemon wedges.
